exercises.title: Algorithm-Agnostic Signing API
exercises.description: Design and implement an algorithm-agnostic signing API.
tasks: Define abstract SigningKey and VerifyingKey interfaces
Implement at least 2 algorithm backends (mock is OK)
Support key export in multiple formats
hints: Use ABC for abstract base classes
Keys should carry their algorithm metadata
Test that same interface works for different algorithms

exercises.title: Key Format Converter
exercises.description: Build a universal key format converter.
tasks: Support PEM, DER, JWK, and RAW formats
Support both public and private keys
exercises.expectedOutput: Format converter handling all major formats

exercises.title: Compatibility Layer Design
exercises.description: Design a compatibility layer for API migration.
tasks: Define old (v1) and new (v2) API interfaces
Create wrapper that maps old to new
exercises.expectedOutput: Working compatibility layer with migration guide
hints: Track warned methods to avoid spam
Test both old and new API paths

exercises.title: Capability Negotiation Protocol
exercises.description: Implement a capability negotiation protocol for distributed systems.
